name: Mexican Polvarone Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the granulated sugar, grated chocolate, and cinnamon in a small bowl; set aside.
2. Preheat the oven to 300°F (150°C).
3. In a large bowl, beat together the Crisco, icing sugar, milk, and vanilla until light and creamy. Gradually add the flour, baking powder, and cinnamon, beating on low speed until the dough is smooth. The dough will be soft.
4. Shape the dough into 1-1/4 inch (3 cm) balls. Place them on an ungreased baking sheet. Flatten each ball to a 2-inch (5 cm) circle about 1/4 inch (6 mm) thick using a glass or pancake turner dipped in flour.
5. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until lightly golden and set around the edges. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for 1 minute before transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely. Each warm cookie should be coated with the coating mixture, turning to coat both sides. Makes about 2 dozen cookies.
Freezing: Excellent
